FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER s1970 ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = s1970.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y1970 ON s1970.YEAR_ID = y1970.YEAR_ID
